title: diphasium scariosum
intro: Diphasium scariosum, also known as the forked fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Diphasium scariosum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its antiseptic properties have been used to treat wounds and skin conditions. Diphasium scariosum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
